caption: The video captures a group of individuals, likely members of a sports team, as they walk through a security checkpoint outside a building. They are dressed in matching attire, consisting of light-colored shirts and dark pants, with some carrying backpacks. Each person is wearing a face mask, adhering to safety protocols. A security officer in a high-visibility vest stands by, monitoring the process. The setting appears to be near a bus labeled "Real Madrid," suggesting that this could be a professional football team arriving or departing for an event. The atmosphere is orderly, with the individuals moving in a single file line, passing through metal detectors before continuing on their way. The presence of media personnel with cameras indicates that this is a publicized event, possibly a match day or a team outing.
